definitions: v. 起缓冲作用；保护，缓和（如减轻关节受到的冲击）

examples.text: So what role does water play in our bodies, and how much do we actually need to drink to stay healthy? The H2O in our bodies works to cushion and lubricate joints, regulate temperature, and to nourish the brain and spinal cord.
examples.explanation: 这里的 cushion 是动词，意思是“起缓冲作用、减轻冲击”。句子意思是：我们体内的水能为关节提供缓冲和润滑、调节体温，并滋养大脑和脊髓。

source.text: What would happen if you didn’t drink water? - Mia Nacamulli
